testcase.name: returns an empty document when there are no params
returns an empty document when there are no params
generates the correct class name from fullName
does not provide documentation by default
can attach documentation if option is enabled
converts all header shapes to rfc822
converts all timestamps in JSON protocol to unixTimestamp
converts all timestamps in XML/query protocol to iso8601
should perform all operations on root (/)
allows mounted path to be specified
should set the body to JSON serialized params
removes prefixes from the error code
returns the full code when a # is not present
returns the status code when the body is blank
returns UnknownError when the error type is not set
returns null for the message when not present
returns the message when the message property is upper-cased
returns a special message for RequestEntityToLarge errors
returns raw data if convertResponseTypes is false
returns an empty object when the body is an empty string
returns an empty object when the body is null

testcase.name: case1
should perform all operations on root (/)
allows mounted path to be specified
should add the api version param
should add the operation name as Action
extracts the error code and message
returns an empty error when the body is blank
parses the response using the operation output rules
performs default xml parsing when output rule is missing
removes wrapping result element if resultWrapper is set
extracts requestId even if output members are absent
does not override RequestId if it is modeled
does not override requestId if it is modeled
performs querystring param replacements on lists
omits querystring when param is not provided
accpets multiple query params with uri params
uri escapes params in both path and querystring
populates the headers with present params
uses default rule name if locationName property is not present

testcase.classname: AWS.Protocol.Rest buildRequest timestamp header with format
testcase.name: populates the header with correct timestamp formatting

testcase.classname: AWS.Protocol.Rest buildRequest timestamp header without format
testcase.name: populates the header using the api formatting

testcase.classname: AWS.Protocol.Rest buildRequest timestamp header with api formatting and parameter formatting
testcase.name: populates the header using the parameter formatting
extracts headers when the rule name is camel-cased
extracts headers when the header name is camel-cased
adds empty map if no matching headers are found
extracts the http status when instructed to
casts string status codes to integers
populates the headers with present params
uses default rule name if .n property is not present
does not populate a body on a GET request
does not populate a body on a HEAD request
does not populate a body on a DELETE request
builds root element if rules contains root
builds payload element as non JSON data if rules contains payload
removes prefixes from the error code
returns the full code when a # is not present
returns the status code when the body is blank
returns null for the message when not present
returns the message when the message property is upper-cased
returns a special message for RequestEntityToLarge errors
pulls header data out of response
pulls body out into data key if body is a scalar payload
pulls body out into data key if body is a structure payload
pulls body out as Buffer if body is streaming payload
returns an empty object when the body is an empty string
returns an empty object when the body is null
uses payload member name for payloads
defaults body to empty string when there are no inputs
defaults body to empty string when no body params are present
does not populate a body on a GET request
does not populate a body on a HEAD request
populates the body with string types directly
populates the body with XML from the params
omits the body xml when body params are not present
extracts the error code and message
returns an empty error when the body is blank
sets payload element to a Buffer object when it streams
sets payload element to String when it does not stream
sets payload element along with other outputs
parses headers when a payload is provided
defaults params to strings when type not specified
works with nested objects that have multiple properties
Uses list-member names instead of the list name
serializes list members as strings when member rule not present
adds a `.member` prefix to each list member
observes both list name and list member name
accepts a hash (object) of arbitrary key/value pairs
serializes timestamp to iso8601 strings by default
obeys format options in the rules
throws errors on synchronous presign failures
limits expiry time to a week in SigV4
sets the date header when not present
omits the security token header when session token is blank
adds a security token header when session token available
adds an Authorization header which contains akid and signature
builds a basic string to sign
includes content md5 and content type when present
includes the http method, whatever it is
includes any x-amz- style headers, but not others
includes x-amz- headers that are lower-cased
builds a canonical resource from the path
appends the bucket to the path when it is part of the hostname
appends the subresource portion of the path querystring
includes the sub resource value when present
omits non-sub-resource querystring params from the resource string
includes the un-decoded query string param for sub resources
includes the replication subresource without a value
includes the non-encoded query string get header overrides
omits the date header when not present
builds a signer for a request object
adds a url encoded iso8601 timestamp param
omits SecurityToken when sessionToken has been omitted
adds the SecurityToken when sessionToken is provided
can build a signer for a request object
should return authorization part for signer
should not compute SHA 256 checksum more than once
will cache a maximum of 50 clients
busts cache if caching is disabled
busts cache if access key changes
uses a different cache if client is different
works when using the same client
should sign correctly generated input string
should lowercase all header names (not values)
should compact multiple spaces in keys/values to a single space
should strip starting and end of line spaces
wraps simple structures with location of body
orders xml members by the order they appear in the rules
serializes empty structures as empty element
includes lists elements even if they have no members
serializes lists without a base wrapper
omits lists elements when no members are given
allows renamed map keys and values
allows renamed map keys and values
ints and floats formatted as numbers
follows the forat given on the shape
can apply xml namespaces on structures
applies namespace prefixes to the xmlns attribute
can apply namespaces to elements that have other attributes
returns empty object when string is empty
returns an empty object from an empty document
returns empty elements as empty string
returns everything as a string (even numbers)
ignores xmlns on the root element
Converts xml lists of strings into arrays of strings
observes list member names when present
can parse lists of strucures with renames
collects sibling elements of the same name
flattened lists can be composed of complex obects
can parse flattened lists of complex objects
expects entry, key, and value elements by default
can use alternate names for key and value elements
expects key and value elements by default
can use alternate names for key and value elements
converts the string "true" in to the boolean value true
converts the string "false" in to the boolean value false
converts the empty elements into null
returns an empty element as null
throws an error when unable to determine the format
float parses elements types as integer
integer parses elements types as integer
base64 decodes string elements with encoding="base64"
throws an error when unable to parse the xml
throws an error when xml is incomplete or does not close all tags
